data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for Instagram bio link integration.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the Instagram bio link integration, but the evidence provided does not include any direct confirmation of this integration. The linked use case mentions the need for Instagram bio link integration, yet there are no API reads or persisted state checks that explicitly confirm its presence or functionality. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no concrete evidence to support or refute the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence of Instagram bio link integration.
